name: ambient-code
description: Community integration (not affiliated with Ambient). Use the Ambient (ambient.xyz) decentralized AI network from Claude Code: /ambient control panel (installs as /ambient-code:ambient), first-run onboarding, sticky model picker with user-curated model menus, second-opinion code audits, native `ambient build` file generation, delegate mode where Ambient models write the code under Claude's review at ~10-40x lower cost, and an Ambient-powered agentic terminal.
